name: Klefki
flavor: In the past, noble families entrusted their vault keys to a Klefki. They passed the Klefki down through the generations, taking good care of it.

ability.name: Dismantling Keys
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If you do, discard this Pokémon.
